cases.base:
mixed-port: 7890
dns:
  enable: true
  ipv6: true
  nameserver: [1.1.1.1]
rules: [MATCH,PROXY]

substore.yaml:
mixed-port: 7891
dns:
  enable: true
  ipv6: false
  nameserver:
    - 8.8.8.8
rules:
  - MATCH
  - PROXY

cases.base:
dns:
  enable: true
  ipv6: true
rules:
  - GEOIP,CN,DIRECT
  - MATCH,PROXY

rewrites.name: yaml
rewrites.content:
+rules:
  - DOMAIN-SUFFIX,example.com,DIRECT
rules+:
  - PROCESS-NAME,curl,DIRECT
dns!:
  enable: false

substore.yaml:
dns:
  enable: false
rules:
  - DOMAIN-SUFFIX,example.com,DIRECT
  - GEOIP,CN,DIRECT
  - MATCH,PROXY
  - PROCESS-NAME,curl,DIRECT

rewrites.name: javascript
rewrites.content: function main(config) { config.proxies[0].name = 'Hong Kong'; config.mode = 'rule'; return config }

substore.yaml:
proxies:
  - name: Hong Kong
    type: vless
mode: rule

cases.difference: BoxFleet rejects Promise results so subscription compilation stays synchronous and bounded; Sub-Store awaits async main(config).

rewrites.name: javascript
rewrites.content: async function main(config) { config.mode = 'rule'; return config }

cases.difference: BoxFleet rejects a JavaScript rewrite without main(config); Sub-Store leaves the profile unchanged.
